series_metadata.series_description: Includes records that have short-lived administrative, legal or fiscal value. They convey information of temporary importance and are of no value once read/viewed/heard and/or acted upon. This series includes, but is not limited to: transient messages, notes, working drafts and other documents, regardless of media format, that serve to convey information of temporary value to which no lasting significance attaches.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of value, then destroy. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of value, then destroy. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
